headline: delta-scp compression demo-server (127.0.0.1:3012). The carry stage: submit a compression job, read its result by id. Consumes a sigil sha256 as the carried artifact's identity (mints UUID job ids, not content-addresses).

capabilities.notes: The always-available read with no precondition: the seam's liveness probe that the carry stage is reachable. Server is launched via npx tsx (launch.json name 'delta-scp-demo' port 3012); the gateway proxies live and does NOT auto-start it.

Reads one compression job by UUID id minted by a prior POST /jobs (a write, gated off unless DESCRIBE_GATEWAY_WRITES=1). Jobs live in an in-memory Map (demo-server.ts:98), so an id does not survive a server restart.
